MOTION For Order To Consolidate Actions For All Purposes Including Trial
Off Calendar Nov-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS GENEVA TRUJILLO, AND, MARY TRUJILLO MOTION for Order to Consolidate Actions for All Purposes Including Trial. Appearances: Kimberly J. Chu, Esq. of Brayton Purcell LLC, (415) 898-1555, appearing for Plaintiff and Moving party; L. Judiee Tran, Esq. of Walsworth Franklin Bevins & McCall LLP , appearing for Defendant Bendex Intern'l Inc. & RPM, Inc. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. Case number 275182 is consolidated with case number 447964 for all purposes including trial. The Lead case number is 447964.Order signed in open Court. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
